hero.subtitle: Hi, I'm Titouan, a passionate fullstack developer with a very diverse background. I hold a degree as a cognitive science engineer, and got a solid experience in web development and design. After 2 years in Italy, I am now moving back to France and looking for exciting new opportunities for me to apply my skills and grow as a developer.

about.title: About Me
about.description:
I'm a dedicated fullstack developer with over 3 years of experience, trained at {university}. 
Thanks to this background, I have a user-centered design approach and understand the importance of a good user experience. In my past experiences on the other hand, I have always been able to take technical subjects in hand and quickly gain skill to focus on the core of the design, without ever compromising on technical quality and clean code.

item1.description: Designed and delivered tools end-to-end, from architecture to deployment, with a strong focus on clean interfaces, performance, and maintainable code. Strong emphasis on functional programming paradigms and development best practices.

item2.description: Development tasks in a challenging and large, international project.

item3.description: Took part in development tasks as a member of a team of 4, contributing to a project for a major actor in the aeronautical industry.

contact.title: Let's get in touch
contact.description: Feel free to reach out for collaborations or just to say hi!
